paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of 2026-07-22, representing a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 trading sessions. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A filed on 2026-07-21 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, an 8-K filed on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes, and a SCHEDULE 13G filed on 2026-07-20. There has been one Form 4 filing.

There have been 4 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including mentions of Fermi Inc. and Siemens turbines, as well as a separate announcement from OpenAI regarding a $20 billion investment in Georgia for a 3.2 GW data center.
